meetingsPage.title: Meetings
meetingsPage.subtitle: Capture mic + system audio for fast, local transcripts.
meetingsPage.nameHint: Leave blank to auto-name with the lightweight model.
meetingsPage.includeSystemAudioHint: Captures meeting audio from other apps. Turn off to record only your mic.

quickTask.modalSubtitle: Capture a task quickly. Press Enter to save instantly.

meetingsPage.emptyBody: Start recording to see your meetings here.
meetingsPage.deletedSubtitle: Meetings stay here for 30 days before permanent deletion.
meetingsPage.permanentDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete this meeting? This cannot be undone.
meetingsPage.notesSubtitle: Capture quick takeaways during the meeting.
meetingsPage.notesPlaceholder: Type a note and press Enter
meetingsPage.notesHint: Click a transcript line to pin the note timestamp.
meetingsPage.transcriptEmpty: No spoken words detected durring meeting.

cards.title: Workspaces
cards.history: Browse your latest transcriptions and copy what you need.
cards.clipboardHistory: Browse recent clipboard text and copy it again.
cards.tasks: Plan your day with tasks, habits, and focus sessions.
cards.dictionary: Manage custom terms for better recognition.
cards.settings: Configure shortcuts, audio, and app preferences.

recent.title: Recent voice captures
recent.empty: No voice history yet. Start dictating to see entries here.

historyPage.title: Voice history
historyPage.subtitle: Search, filter, and revisit everything you dictated.

clipboardHistoryPage.title: Clipboard history
clipboardHistoryPage.subtitle: Search and copy recent clipboard items captured by BreezeType.
clipboardHistoryPage.openPickerSuffix: anywhere to browse and paste previous clipboard items.
clipboardHistoryPage.clearRangeSubtitle: Choose which clipboard items to clear across all apps.
clipboardHistoryPage.clearPastDayDescription: Remove clipboard items copied in the last 24 hours.
clipboardHistoryPage.clearPastWeekDescription: Remove clipboard items copied in the last 7 days.
clipboardHistoryPage.clearConfirmBody: This will permanently remove the selected clipboard history items. This cannot be undone.
clipboardHistoryPage.shortcutModalSubtitle: Set the picker shortcut and quick keys used while it is open.

notesPage.title: Notes
notesPage.subtitle: Capture ideas while you dictate.
notesPage.emptyBody: Create a note to start capturing thoughts.

entries.title: Dictionary entries
entries.description: Add terms BreezeType should spell exactly.
entries.helper: Notes are optional and only help BreezeType recognize the intended term.
entries.definitionPlaceholder: Optional context, like internal customer platform
entries.addSubtitle: Add a word or phrase BreezeType should spell exactly.

placeholders.dictionary: Your custom terminology and definitions will appear here.
placeholders.snippets: Reusable snips and saved phrases will appear here.
placeholders.style: Tune tone and formatting preferences here.
placeholders.notes: Capture quick notes from your dictation history.
placeholders.help: Tips and support resources will live here.

tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: A guided practice for dictation, clipboard history, tasks, and meeting recordings.
tutorial.cardSubtitle: Practice dictation, clipboard history, tasks, and meeting recordings.
tutorial.reminder: This tutorial is always available in the Help area.

dictation.title: Speak once
dictation.description: Use your current shortcut, read one phrase, and watch BreezeType place the text.

clipboard.title: Find and paste
clipboard.description: Copy two snippets, then practice pulling them back with the clipboard manager.

tasks.title: Capture next steps
tasks.description: Open Quick Task, type a natural-language task, and see how BreezeType reads it.

meetings.title: Record and review
meetings.description: Record the call you are already in. BreezeType transcribes locally without adding a bot.

finish.title: You are ready
finish.description: You have the core BreezeType loop: speak, reuse clips, capture tasks, and record meetings.

issue.title: Current issue
issue.description: If something is wrong, you’ll see it here.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Check required system permissions.
permissions.notSupported: Permission checks are only available on macOS.

support.title: How can we help?
support.subtitle: Send a message and screenshots to the BreezeType team.
support.signInRequired: Sign in to send a help request.

errors.messageRequired: Write a short message before sending.
errors.signInRequired: Sign in to send a help request.
errors.tooManyScreenshots: You can attach up to 3 screenshots.
errors.screenshotTooLarge: Each screenshot must be 4 MB or smaller.
errors.screenshotRead: We could not read that screenshot.
errors.send: Could not send your help request. Please try again.

errors.loadModels: BreezeType couldn't finish getting ready. Please try again.
errors.downloadModel: BreezeType couldn't finish setup. Please check your connection and try again.

modelSelector.downloadPrompt: BreezeType needs a quick one-time setup before dictation is ready.
modelSelector.noModelsAvailable: BreezeType setup is not available right now.
modelSelector.readyOptionDescription: BreezeType is ready for local dictation.
modelSelector.deleteError: BreezeType could not remove that download. Please try again.
modelSelector.modelError: BreezeType needs attention. Please try again.

shortcut.title: BreezeType Shortcuts
shortcut.description: Configure keyboard shortcuts to trigger speech-to-text recording

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

quickPastes.title: Clipboard Quick Keys
quickPastes.description: Map a single key to text you can instantly paste while the clipboard picker is open.

errors.invalidKey: Use exactly one printable key per row.
errors.duplicateKey: Key '{{key}}' is used more than once.
errors.emptyText: Text for key '{{key}}' cannot be empty.

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language for speech recognition. Auto will automatically determine the language, while selecting a specific language can improve accuracy for that language.
language.descriptionUnsupported: BreezeType automatically detects the language. No manual selection is needed.

pushToTalk.label: Push To Talk
pushToTalk.description: Hold to record, release to stop

fnKey.label: Use Fn/Globe Key
fnKey.description: Hold Fn/Globe to record, release to stop (macOS only). Requires Input Monitoring permission.
fnKey.requiresPushToTalk: Enable Push To Talk to use the Fn/Globe key.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose light or dark mode, or follow the system setting.

audioFeedback.label: Audio Feedback
audioFeedback.description: Play sound when recording starts and stops

outputDevice.title: Output Device
outputDevice.description: Select your preferred audio output device for feedback sounds

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: Adjust the volume of audio feedback sounds

startHidden.label: Start Hidden
startHidden.description: Launch to system tray without opening the window.

autostart.label: Launch on Startup
autostart.description: Automatically start BreezeType when you log in to your computer.

overlay.title: Overlay Position
overlay.description: Display visual feedback overlay during recording and transcription. On Linux 'None' is recommended.

meetingDetection.label: Meeting detection
meetingDetection.description: Show a small prompt when a meeting app or tab becomes active.

audioWhileSpeaking.label: Audio While Speaking
audioWhileSpeaking.description: 0% mutes, 100% leaves audio unchanged, values in between duck to that level.

pasteMethod.title: Paste Method
pasteMethod.description: Choose how text is inserted. Direct: simulates typing via system input. None: skips paste, only updates history/clipboard.

clipboardHandling.title: Clipboard Handling
clipboardHandling.description: Don't Modify Clipboard preserves your current clipboard contents after transcription. Copy to Clipboard leaves the transcription result in your clipboard after pasting.

translateToEnglish.label: Translate to English
translateToEnglish.description: Automatically translate speech from other languages to English during transcription.
translateToEnglish.descriptionUnsupported: Translation is not available with the current speech setup.

removeFillerWords.label: Remove Filler Words
removeFillerWords.description: During cleanup, remove non-meaningful fillers such as um, uh, ah, er, hmm, and like when used as filler.

modelUnload.title: Release Speech Resources
modelUnload.description: Automatically free local speech resources after BreezeType has been idle for the specified time.

customWords.title: Custom Words
customWords.description: Add words that are often misheard or misspelled during transcription. The system will automatically correct similar-sounding words to match your list.

postProcessing.title: Post Process
postProcessing.disabledNotice: Post processing is currently disabled. Enable it in Debug settings to configure.

provider.title: Connection
provider.description: Choose how BreezeType should run transcript cleanup.

appleIntelligence.title: Apple Intelligence
appleIntelligence.description: Runs fully on-device. No API key or network access is required.
appleIntelligence.requirements: Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later. Apple Intelligence must be enabled in System Settings.

baseUrl.title: Custom connection
baseUrl.description: Connection address for custom cleanup setups.

apiKey.title: Connection key
apiKey.description: Private key for the selected cleanup connection.

model.title: Cleanup option
model.descriptionApple: Provide an optional numeric token limit or keep the default on-device preset.
model.descriptionCustom: Provide the cleanup option expected by your custom endpoint.
model.descriptionDefault: Choose a cleanup option exposed by the selected connection.

prompts.title: Prompt

selectedPrompt.title: Selected Prompt
selectedPrompt.description: Select a template for refining transcriptions or create a new one. Use ${output} inside the prompt text to reference the captured transcript.

prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Write the instructions to run after transcription. Example: Improve grammar and clarity for the following text: ${output}
prompts.promptTip: Tip: Use ${output} to insert the transcribed text in your prompt.
prompts.selectToEdit: Select a prompt above to view and edit its details.
prompts.createFirst: Click 'Create New Prompt' above to create your first post-processing prompt.

history.title: History
history.empty: No transcriptions yet. Start recording to build your history!
history.deleteError: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.

logDirectory.title: Log Directory
logDirectory.description: Location where log files are stored

updateChecks.label: Check for Updates
updateChecks.description: Automatically check for new versions of BreezeType

soundTheme.label: Sound Theme
soundTheme.description: Choose a sound theme for recording start and stop feedback

historyLimit.title: History Limit
historyLimit.description: Maximum number of history entries to keep

recordingRetention.title: Auto-Delete Recordings
recordingRetention.description: Automatically delete old recordings to save space

alwaysOnMicrophone.label: Always-On Microphone
alwaysOnMicrophone.description: Keep microphone active for faster response

clamshellMicrophone.title: Clamshell Microphone
clamshellMicrophone.description: Microphone to use when laptop lid is closed

postProcessingToggle.label: Post Processing
postProcessingToggle.description: Enable AI-powered text refinement after transcription

recordingOutputMode.label: Audio While Recording
recordingOutputMode.description: Control how system audio behaves while BreezeType is listening

appendTrailingSpace.label: Append Trailing Space
appendTrailingSpace.description: Add a space after pasted transcription

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Check now, while BreezeType also checks automatically in the background

appDataDirectory.title: App Data Directory
appDataDirectory.description: Location where BreezeType stores its data

whisper.title: Local speech engine
whisper.description: Local speech processing used by BreezeType
whisper.details: BreezeType uses local speech processing for fast dictation.

clipboardOverlay.title: Clipboard history
clipboardOverlay.hint: Enter to paste, Esc to close

footer.updatePrompt: BreezeType {{version}} is available. Install now? The app will relaunch.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: BreezeType needs accessibility permissions to type transcribed text.

permissionsGate.title: Permissions required
permissionsGate.subtitle: Enable these macOS permissions so BreezeType can record and type transcription automatically.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Type or paste transcribed text into other apps.

screenRecording.title: Screen Recording
screenRecording.description: Record system audio for meetings and enhanced dictation.

permissionsGate.hint: Some permissions must be enabled in System Settings. After turning a permission on, return to BreezeType and click Refresh.

appLanguage.title: Application Language
appLanguage.description: Change the language of the BreezeType interface

commandsPage.title: Snips
commandsPage.subtitle: Create voice commands that trigger actions.

open.title: Open
open.description: Say “open <phrase>” to launch apps. Targets can be app names or full paths.

takeNote.title: Take note
takeNote.description: Say a quick phrase to open Notes and keep dictating into a new note.

snippets.title: Snips
snippets.description: Reusable expansions you can trigger by voice or typing.
snippets.helper: Short trigger phrases that expand into the template.
snippets.addSubtitle: Define triggers and the text that should expand.
